selected_question.name: late_repair90_micro_deficit_repair_guard_no_order_review
selected_question.mechanism_question: In a fresh live/no-order same-host window, do late repair_or_pairing_improving micro-deficit seeds with 0 < pre_seed_opp_qty - pre_seed_same_qty <= 0.25 and pre_seed_open_qty <= 1.0 appear with enough same-window source-link coverage, residual-tail concentration, and normalized risk-budget quality to justify implementing micro_deficit_repair_guard_v1 in the no-order runner?

evidence_basis: Local state-machine verifier retained seed_actions 95.077%, gross_buy_qty 95.010%, and pair_qty 95.685%.
Local verifier reduced residual_qty_rate by 58.006% and residual_cost_rate by 72.205%.
Local verifier improved stress100_worst_pnl but introduced a fee_after_pnl and worst-day fee tradeoff, so live/no-order review must check normalized risk budgets and economics together.
Selected replay_store_v2 source-truth readiness validated 60/60 affected seed requests with market_meta, L1, L2, trade-before, trade-after, and settlement refs all present.
replay_store_v2 private truth rows are zero, so this remains source-truth research only.
live_or_shadow_observable_pre_action_fie: pre_seed_open_qty or same+opp open qty proxy

bounded_safety_preflight_if_later_approv: Confirm no active xuan-research shadow runner before start.
Confirm shared-ingress read-only client prerequisites exist: broker manifest, market.sock, chainlink.sock, local_price.sock, and fresh heartbeat.
Confirm root disk and inode usage are safe.
Copy only current tools/xuan_dplus_passive_passive_shadow_runner.py into an isolated run directory.
Do not repo sync/build, do not run service/systemd controls, do not modify shared-ingress/broker/env/live paths, and do not send orders/cancels/redeems.
post_run_review_if_later_finished: Run shadow trading acceptance and report research_ranking separately from promotion_gate.
Run source-link transition scorer and require aggregate parity/source-link fields.
Run residual-tail exemplar scorer and require required-field/source_sequence/quote/order coverage.
Review micro-deficit signature coverage from pre_seed same/opp qty and source_risk_direction fields without using source_pair/source_residual future labels as live criteria.
Only after the no-order window is pulled back may a local runner implementation/spec for micro_deficit_repair_guard_v1 be proposed.

keep_requires: risk_adjusted_pnl_proxy is nonnegative or explicitly explained by a bounded fee tradeoff
source-link transition scorer aggregate parity pass
micro-deficit pre-action fields are present enough to evaluate source_risk_direction=repair_or_pairing_improving and 0 < pre_seed_opp_qty - pre_seed_same_qty <= 0.25
micro-deficit residual-tail signature is concentrated enough to nominate exactly one local runner implementation target without summary-only removal
unknown_or_tradeoff_if: pair economics are positive but sample/risk budgets fail
micro-deficit fields are present but live/no-order opportunity volume is thin
micro-deficit residual-tail exemplars are concentrated but fee/worst-day tradeoff remains material
summaries cannot distinguish repair_or_pairing_improving micro-deficit seeds from broader late-repair residual tails
discard_if: residual risk remains broad and not concentrated in micro-deficit repair context
the only apparent fix is summary-only removal, static side/offset cutoff, price/cap family, cooldown/admission cap, fill-to-balance revival, portfolio-ledger trading rule, or broad replay search
source_pair/source_residual post-action labels are used as live pre-action criteria
any result is framed as private truth, canary, deployable, or promotion evidence
blocked_only_if: allowlisted artifacts are corrupt or missing

research_ranking.label: KEEP_MICRO_DEFICIT_NO_ORDER_SHADOW_QUESTION_SELECTED
evidence_basis: micro_deficit_repair_guard_v1 is the first narrow pre-action separator in this line with large local residual-rate reduction and acceptable sample retention
selected replay_store_v2 source-truth readiness validated representative affected seeds
fee_after_pnl and worst-day tradeoffs require no-order window review before any runner implementation or shadow promotion claim

next_executable_action: Wait for exact main-thread approval before any SSH/remote start. If approved, run bounded safety preflight and start exactly one diagnostic-only no-order shadow for late_repair90_micro_deficit_repair_guard_no_order_review. If not approved, continue local-only by implementing a micro-deficit no-order summary scorer/spec; do not start another shadow from heartbeat alone.
